MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Edward W. Heffner, Jr., Esq. of HABBAS, AMENDOLA 408/278-0480, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Mohammad Roshangah

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, EDWARD WILSON HEFFNER, JR.'S MOTION To Be Relieved As PLAINTIFF MOHAMMAN ROSHANGAH'S Counsel was granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780
